title: PvP Utils
description: A texture pack, which adds Quality of Life Improvements for PvP, while keeping it in a vanilla style.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bc48e2da763e7d5bc54ddb542020744b38aad14.png)       

[![Modrinth](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_64h.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pvp-utils)
[![Discord](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/social/discord-singular_64h.png?raw=true)](https://discordapp.com/users/886900139397111830)
[![Ko-Fi](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_64h.png?raw=true)](https://ko-fi.com/soguy)

### This Ressource Pack adds many Quality of Life Textures, while keeping the game in a vanilla-ish Style. 
### Features are as followed:
- Side Shield and Smaller Shield Block
- Low Fire Overlay
- No Fishing Bobber
- Better powdered Snow
- Brewing Stand Guide
- No Explosion
- Small Totem Pop
- Visual Note Block Pitch
- Border around Suspicious Gravel & Sand
- Quieter Sound for Explosions, Fire Hurting and Rain

<details>

https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/lower-shield-5669766/
